name: vibin
description: Session, GitHub review, CI, repo status, and agent workflow skills for quick push, session documentation, PR comments, CI debugging, and branch/worktree readiness audits.

interface.shortDescription: Session, repo status, GitHub review, CI, and agent workflow utilities.
interface.longDescription: Vibin bundles session documentation, repo status and branch/worktree readiness audits, quick-push, GitHub PR review, CI debugging, Windows VM, screenshot, clipboard, and homelab workflow skills.
defaultPrompt: Use Vibin to quick-push this change.
Use Vibin to audit repo branch and worktree status.
Use Vibin to address PR review comments.
